lessons.title: What's a Function? 🤖
lessons.description: Stop repeating code! Build reusable mini-machines.

lessons.title: Passing Data In 📥
lessons.description: Feed your functions with Parameters and Arguments.

lessons.title: Getting Data Out 📤
lessons.description: Make your functions hand back answers using Return values.

lessons.title: Scope & Arrows 🏹
lessons.description: Understand where variables live, and learn the arrow function shortcut.
